raw_results.query: best practices autonomous LLM agent memory management
new methods for LLM agent orchestration and multi-agent coordination

suggestions: Reflexion and Self-Refine**: Agents reflect on outputs, generate critiques, and refine prompts iteratively.[1]
Self-Correction Training (RISE, STaR, SELF, STaSC)**: Models learn to self-correct using rationales from successes/failures, expanding to tool-use and multi-agent tasks.[1]
Self-Reward and Consistency**: Agents score their own outputs for RL (e.g., Self-Rewarding Language Models) or select majority from multiple chains.[1]
